overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a convertible driving through a desert highway approaching a futuristic metropolis. The vehicle traverses palm-lined roads, passes through a covered tunnel, and navigates under massive elevated highway interchanges with bright sunny weather throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway with palm tree lining

events.description: pink sports car overtakes on the left lane and passes out of view
approaching tunnel entrance as the road enters a covered section

agents.ego_description: driving a gold convertible at high speed on a multi-lane desert highway

notable_agents.action: white sedan maintaining position ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining both sides of the highway creating a tropical desert aesthetic
metal guardrails with yellow reflective markers running along both sides of the road
brown arid mountains visible in the background under the clear blue sky
concrete tunnel entrance appearing at the end of the highway straightaway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sun-drenched desert highway lined with palm trees and metal guardrails. The convertible follows a white sedan toward a distant mountain range. A pink sports car overtakes quickly on the left before the vehicle approaches a concrete tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway tunnel with open side walls

events.description: entering tunnel causes sudden shift from bright sunlight to artificial fluorescent lighting
exiting tunnel back into bright sunlight creating a brief exposure adjustment

agents.ego_description: maintaining highway speed through the covered tunnel section

entered.detail: smooth gray concrete walls with periodic openings showing outside vegetation
solid concrete ceiling with embedded linear fluorescent light fixtures
bright white linear lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling illuminating the road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered tunnel section with concrete walls and artificial lighting. The tunnel has open sections on the left revealing glimpses of the outside landscape and distant city buildings. The lighting shifts dramatically from natural sun to cool fluorescent before emerging back into daylight at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding highway with panoramic city views

events.description: exiting tunnel onto open winding road with futuristic city skyline visible in distance
navigating a sharp left curve on the mountain highway

agents.ego_description: steering through winding mountain roads with the city skyline as backdrop

entered.detail: reddish-brown rocky terrain and cliffs lining the right side of the highway
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings of Night City visible in the distance
large digital billboard mounted on the right side of the road
dry bushes and desert vegetation on the rocky hillsides

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the road curves through arid rocky terrain with the futuristic city skyline now visible in the distance. The vehicle navigates a sharp left bend past desert scrub and rocky cliffs. A large billboard stands on the right as the highway winds toward the metropolitan area.

events.description: passing industrial buildings and entering area with elevated highway overpasses
merging traffic from ramp on the right side

agents.ego_description: navigating winding road through industrial zone with complex overpass infrastructure

notable_agents.action: vehicle merging from the right ramp onto the main highway

entered.detail: large industrial buildings with pipes and smokestacks on the left side
multi-level highway ramps and overpasses crossing above the road
tall metal electrical transmission towers with power lines
concrete and steel highway overpass creating partial cover overhead

segments.scene_description: The highway winds through an industrial area with factories and electrical towers on the left. Massive elevated highway structures and overpasses begin to dominate the view overhead. The vehicle takes a right curve as another car merges from a ramp, with the city skyline now visible to the left through the infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with concrete overpasses

events.description: entering deep shadow beneath massive concrete overpass structure
navigating tight left curve beneath the elevated highway system

agents.ego_description: driving beneath multiple levels of highway infrastructure in shadowed underpass

entered.detail: massive concrete underside of the elevated highway directly overhead
thick concrete pillars supporting the multi-level highway structure
illuminated billboards and neon signs attached to the overpass structure
curving highway ramps and interchanges visible above and ahead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a complex multi-level interchange, driving beneath massive concrete overpasses that block most of the sunlight. Thick support pillars line the road while neon advertisements glow on the left. The camera navigates a tight left curve through the shadowed underpass with multiple highway levels visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a sun-drenched desert highway into the shadowed, concrete depths of a futuristic metropolitan interchange. It begins on a bright road lined with palm trees, following a white sedan and being overtaken by a pink sports car before the vehicle enters a covered tunnel. As the lighting shifts from natural sunlight to cool fluorescent tones, the camera glimpses the distant city through open sections of the tunnel walls before emerging back into the daylight of an arid, rocky landscape. The scene then expands as the highway winds past desert scrub and industrial factories, with the city skyline growing larger while massive elevated overpasses begin to loom overhead. Finally, the vehicle navigates a tight curve into a complex multi-level interchange, where the bright sky is replaced by towering concrete pillars and glowing neon advertisements in the deep shadows of the underpass.
